orig_text: 8.2. DNS SVBC Service Parameter Keys (SvcParamKeys) Registry
correct_text: 8.2. DNS SVCB Service Parameter Keys (SvcParamKeys) Registry
notes:
There is a typo in the heading of section 8.2: "SVCB" is mistakenly written as "SVBC".
This refers to the Service Parameter Keys of DNS Service Binding, so the correct term is "SVCB".
